mapper.sql: upload_id, space_id, parent_id, name, size_bytes, mime_type, object_id, version_id, oss_session_id, status, created_by, created_at, expires_at, completed_entry_id
mapper.insert: insert into drive_upload( upload_id, space_id, parent_id, name, size_bytes, mime_type, object_id, version_id, oss_session_id, status, created_by, created_at, expires_at, completed_entry_id ) values( #{uploadId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{spaceId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{parentId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{name}, #{sizeBytes}, #{mimeType}, #{objectId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{versionId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{ossSessionId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{status}, #{createdBy, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{createdAt}, #{expiresAt}, #{completedEntryId, jdbcType=BINARY} )
mapper.update: update drive_upload set space_id = #{spaceId, jdbcType=BINARY}, parent_id = #{parentId, jdbcType=BINARY}, name = #{name}, size_bytes = #{sizeBytes}, mime_type = #{mimeType}, object_id = #{objectId, jdbcType=BINARY}, version_id = #{versionId, jdbcType=BINARY}, oss_session_id = #{ossSessionId, jdbcType=BINARY}, status = #{status}, created_by = #{createdBy, jdbcType=BINARY}, created_at = #{createdAt}, expires_at = #{expiresAt}, completed_entry_id = #{completedEntryId, jdbcType=BINARY} where upload_id = #{uploadId, jdbcType=BINARY}
